hooks.command: osascript -e 'if application "iTerm2" is not frontmost then display notification "Claude Code is done" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Blow"'
osascript -e 'if application "iTerm2" is not frontmost then display notification "Claude Code needs input" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Bottle"'

statusLine.command: bash -c 'plugin_dir=$(ls -d "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-hud/claude-hud/*/ 2>/dev/null | awk -F/ '"'"'{ print $(NF-1) "\t" $0 }'"'"' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n -k4,4n | tail -1 | cut -f2-); exec "/Users/mikefunk/.local/share/mise/installs/bun/1.3.10/bin/bun" "${plugin_dir}src/index.ts"'
